film.title: Hulchul
film.overview: A troubled ACP adopts a young poor child named Deva whose mother and father died. When he grows up, he helps his adopted father as a police officer and ACP to solve various crimes around town to save his job and protect his family. Deva should not only help his father by tracking down a mob or fight gang members, but he has to release his half-brother Karan from police custody after he is framed for murder.

dialogues.dialogue: why then did you have to work as a cop? I'm not working out of compulsion but for my pleasure. He does it for his pride! He doesn't want to ask you for money. I thought you love me the most.

Bow your head when you speak to me. You're no more than a fleck of dust off my shoes. Even the dust doesn't care for empty pride. Kick a t dust, and it'll rise to fall on your own head. It isn't good for you to be so warm-blooded.
After he confesses before the court, your brother is free. Take him away. I'm very proud of you, Deva ! No! No! we can't allow tha t to happen.
